title: Walnut Pesto Pasta with Croatian Sausage
description: A hearty and flavorful pasta dish featuring Croatian sausage, walnuts, and a rich pesto sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the Croatian sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped walnuts and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in the parmesan cheese and cook until melted.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water and then drain the pasta.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet with the sausage mixture and toss to combine.
If the pasta seems dry, add a bit of the reserved pasta water.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
